title: KPhi1 Omega Kernel v4.0 / installable cognitive seed
availability: Capsule is in D-ND_LAB. Full source must be provided separately or vendored before BODY/BODY_PLUS_REFS use.
use_when: A generated Lab must become an autonomous AI system, not only a domain report loop.
The system needs local context/genome propagation.
The system needs safe self-modification with veto.
The system needs memory as process/KLI rather than plain logs.
The system must regenerate a minimum runtime from a bootstrap.
do_not_use_for: Copying KPhi1 ontology into a domain Lab report.
Replacing domain-native observables with KPhi1 vocabulary.
Declaring KPhi1 skills active without reading their bodies.
Making finance/physics/editorial imitate KPhi1 as content.

distilled_patterns.summary: System actions are checked against lineage/intent, integrity, entropy, resonance, resultant quality, learning/KLI, and bias/ethics.
Observe without immediate collapse, relate faculties/tools, let a resultant emerge, then integrate learning.
Global DNA plus local _AI_CONTEXT.md per significant directory/domain; local context can restrict but not contradict global seed.
Select a minimal capability combo from a faculty map according to movement class and task type.
Before seed/MML/skill/UI self-modification, scan for source/integrity/autopoiesis violation and block if needed.
Memory is process: crystallize only what increases autonomy/coherence; otherwise decay or vault. Significant cycles produce KLI/triplets.
An inert environment can generate minimum runtime files from a blueprint.
New skills are synthesized from declared parents and goal; not concatenated; permanent vs ephemeral scope is explicit.

candidate_sources.use: kernel overview, P0-P6, VRA, faculty map

read_depth_policy.minimum_for_new_skill_generation: BODY for parents plus contamination statement

contamination_risks: Ontological language can become decorative instead of executable.
Skill names may be treated as authority without body/eval.
KPhi1 can overwrite domain-native observables if copied literally.
Older registry entries may be renamed/retired compared with current Lab diagnostics.
